latestUpdates.data: Special Entry Darshan (Rs.300) tickets for June-2026 will be available for booking w.e.f. 24.03.2026, 10:00 AM. Please [Click Here](/slot-booking?flow=sed&flowIdentifier=sed)
Tirumala and Tirupati Accommodation Quota for June-2026 will be available for booking w.e.f. 24.03.2026, 03:00 PM. Please [Click Here](/accommodation/instructions?flow=acc&flowIdentifier=acc)

Sri Padmavathi Ammavari Temple, Tiruchanoor Special Entry Darshan (Rs. 200/-) tickets for April-2026 will be available for booking w.e.f, 24.03.2026, 10:00 AM. Please [Click Here](/spat/slot-booking?flow=spat&flowIdentifier=spat)

The Online Seva (Virtual participation) and connected Darshan quota for Kalyanothsavam, Unjal Seva, Arjitha Brahmotsavam & Sahasra Deepalankara Sevas of Srivari Temple, Tirumala for June-2026 will be available for booking w.e.f. 21.03.2026, 3:00 PM. Please [Click Here](/virtual-seva/seva-instructions?templeName=Srivari%20Temple&sevaName=All&flowIdentifier=virtual-seva&flow=virtual-seva)

Arjitha Kalyanotsavam Seva tickets for 27.03.2026 at Sri Venugopala Swamy Temple, Karvetinagaram will be available for booking from 21.03.2026 at 03:30 PM. Please [Click Here](/arjitha-seva/slot-booking?section=pilgrim-details&flowIdentifier=arjitha-seva&templeName=Sri%20Venugopala%20Swamy%20Temple&sevaName=Arjitha%20Kalyanotsavam%20(SriRamula%20Vari%20Kalyanam))
Senior Citizens / Physically challenged quota for June-2026 has been completed.
Tirumala Angapradakshinam tokens for June-2026 have been completed.

Total number of Seva E - Dip Registrations received for June-2026 and check below for selected list : 

Thomalaseva: **661337**

Archana: **652736** 

Astadala Pada Padmaradhana: **625026** 

Suprabhatham: **729943** 

Please [Click Here](https://ttdevasthanams.ap.gov.in/assets/misc/images/v4/PROD_DIP_SELECTION_2026_03_20_2026_03_20_EDIP_SELECTIONS.pdf)
Srivari Arjitha Seva tickets quota for the Sevas like Kalyanam, Unjal Seva, Arjitha Brahmotsavam, and Sahasra Deepalankara Seva for June-2026 have been completed
Jyestabhishekam Seva tickets quota from 26.06.2026 to 28.06.2026 have been completed

For selected list of Angapradakshinam Seva tickets eDip registrations for Tirupati (Urban & Rural), Tirumala, Chandragiri Mandal and Renigunta Mandal locals , Please [Click here](https://ttdevasthanams.ap.gov.in/assets/misc/images/v4/Angapradakshinam_DIP_Results_19-03-2026.pdf)
 
The selected pilgrims shall pay a deposit amount of Rs. 500/- before 12:00 PM on 20.03.2026, to confirm their Angapradakshinam Seva.

TTD - Local Temples Seva Quota for April-2026 will be available for booking w.e.f 25.03.2026 at 10:00 AM. Please [Click Here](/arjitha-seva/slot-booking?section=pilgrim-details&flowIdentifier=arjitha-seva&templeName=Sri%20Padmavathi%20Ammavari%20Temple&sevaName=All)

Sri Srinivasa Divyanugraha Visesha Homam at Saptha Gau Pradhakshina shala, Alipiri Tickets for the month of April-2026 will be available for booking w.e.f. 25.03.2026, 10.00 AM. Please [Click Here](/arjitha-seva/slot-booking?section=pilgrim-details&flowIdentifier=arjitha-seva&templeName=Sapthagiri%Gau%Pradakshina%Shala&sevaName=Sri%Srinivasa%Divyaanugraha%Homam)
To generate Digital passbook for the donations made before September 2016, please [click here](https://tirupatibalaji.ap.gov.in/#/donorPassbook)

The Advance booking Arjitha Seva ticket holders of Sahasrakalasabhishekam, Vishesha Pooja, Nijapada darshanam are requested to avail Break Darshan or to get refund instead of Seva for their booking made in advance. Please [click here](https://arjithaseva.tirupatibalaji.ap.gov.in/#/) to avail break darshan or to get refund.
To enable self service for the existing    donors, please [Click here](https://tirupatibalaji.ap.gov.in/#/donorSelfservice)
